differentials.name: lipoid pneumonia (ill-defined mass / lung infiltrate); granulomatous disease
differentials.raw: lipoid pneumonia (ill-defined mass / lung infiltrate); granulomatous disease

context: growth patterns: slow / rapid / stable with later growth | usually diameter increase by 1.5 mm/year doubling in size every 14 years | fat density detectable in 34% (-80 to -120 HU) | calcium + fat detectable in 19%
